description: Style Notebaldessarini Delmar Prestige refil perfume, for men, is a refreshing, spicy-woody fragrance launched a few years back by hugo.Product DetailsTop notes are juicy mandarin, black pepper and bergamot middle notes are cedar, cinnamon and cardamom and base notes are vetiver, olibanum, patchouli and ambergrisCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSizeQuantity: 50 ml
